'''âp-g-v-h''' ('''kapagvehoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:flannel|flannel]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-g-v-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:flannel|flannel]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-g-v-h
|-
! Lemma
| kapagvehoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipagvehoko|thipagvehoko]] || [[word:jipagvehoko|jipagvehoko]] || [[word:shipagvehoko|shipagvehoko]] || [[word:kipagvehoko|kipagvehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupagvehoko|thuthupagvehoko]] || [[word:jujupagvehoko|jujupagvehoko]] || [[word:shushupagvehoko|shushupagvehoko]] || [[word:kukupagvehoko|kukupagvehoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopagvehoko|thopagvehoko]] || [[word:jopagvehoko|jopagvehoko]] || [[word:shopagvehoko|shopagvehoko]] || [[word:kopagvehoko|kopagvehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpagvehoko|thĂŠpagvehoko]] || [[word:jĂŠpagvehoko|jĂŠpagvehoko]] || [[word:shĂŠpagvehoko|shĂŠpagvehoko]] || [[word:kĂŠpagvehoko|kĂŠpagvehoko]]

|-

|-

|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
